note: structured rendering of the identical fact atoms; links relate records, they do not conclude

identity.text: Case subject: sample tray ST-559, version v1, under screening check.

procedure.text: The job card lists acceptance standard edition AS-2019 for this case.
The governing contract row for this case class lists acceptance standard edition AS-2024.

execution.text: The inspector applied the edition listed on the job card exactly; the step log matches it.
Under the applied edition the case PASSES; the margin sheet notes 0.2 units to the limit of the contract-listed edition.

obligations.text: The draft completion statement records acceptance with no note about editions.
